title: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
summary: OpenKnowledge 是一个开源的 AI 优先笔记工具，支持 WYSIWYG 编辑、Claude/Codex 集成和团队协作。
translated_summary: OpenKnowledge is an open-source AI-first note-taking tool with WYSIWYG editing, direct integrations with Claude/Codex, and team collaboration features.
